{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Xarro’kesh
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Xarro’kesh]] is an ant with three heads, each the size of a dreadnought.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
